name: 24" Latching Christmas Wreath Storage - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your wreaths merry, bright, and perfectly protected until next season! Store them safely with the Brightroom™ Nesting Wreath Box, a durable plastic storage bin designed for wreaths up to 24" in diameter. The unique integrated hanging feature keeps seasonal wreaths securely in place, supporting their original shape. The clear lid lets you identify contents at a glance, while the festive red base makes the storage bin easy to spot. Four snap latches keep the base and lid secure, and transport is simple with the integrated handle. Sturdy feet allow the bin to stand upright for efficient storage while protecting wreaths, until it’s time to decorate again.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
